summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Retail Payment Solutions page at /retail-payment-solutions completed successfully. All 17 requested features tested and passed.

passed: Page loads at /retail-payment-solutions with correct title 'Retail Payment Systems | Get a Retail POS for $0' and meta description
Hero section displays with heading 'Retail Payment Processing Solutions', subtitle about Clover/Exatouch/Square, and two CTA buttons (Get a Retail Quote, Schedule a Live Demo)
High-volume retail section shows 8 POS system support features with checkmarks
Clover Retail POS section with 5 'Best for' tags, 6 features, and internal link to /pos/clover
Exatouch POS section with 7 'Best for' tags, 7 features, and internal link to /pos/exatouch
Square Retail POS section with 5 'Best for' tags, 5 features, and internal link to /pos/square
Inventory Management section with 6 feature items and 'Stop guessing' tagline
Payment Processing dark section with 7 payment types and 4 merchant benefits
Retail Niches section with 10 niche cards (Grocery, Convenience, Bodegas, Clothing, Smoke, CBD, Liquor, Gift, Bookstores, Specialty) - all data-testids present (niche-0 through niche-9)
Why MSC section with 6 reasons and image
FAQ section with 5 accordion items that expand/collapse correctly
Final CTA section with two buttons
Quote modal opens with Lead Connector iframe and closes properly
Demo modal opens with Calendly widget and closes properly
Navigation link 'Retail' under Industries dropdown points to /retail-payment-solutions
Route alias /industries/retail loads the same RetailSolutions page
SEO footer with keywords present
Internal links to /pos/clover, /pos/exatouch, /pos/square all navigate correctly
All 9 images loaded successfully (no broken images)
Design review: Good contrast, proper spacing, professional layout

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for all key sections and interactive elements
Shadcn Accordion component used correctly for FAQ section with proper expand/collapse behavior
Modal implementations follow good patterns with backdrop click and close button to close
React Router Links used correctly for internal navigation
SEO: document.title and meta description set dynamically in useEffect
Calendly script loaded conditionally only when demo modal opens (good performance practice)
All images from Unsplash loaded successfully with proper alt text
seed_data_creation: None required - static content page with hardcoded data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Retail Payment Solutions page at /retail-payment-solutions is fully functional. All sections render correctly including Hero, High-Volume, three POS platforms (Clover/Exatouch/Square), Inventory Management, Payment Processing, Retail Niches (10 cards), Why MSC, FAQ (5 accordions), Final CTA, and SEO footer. Both modals (Quote with Lead Connector, Demo with Calendly) work correctly. Navigation integration verified - 'Retail' link in Industries dropdown and route alias /industries/retail both work. Internal links to /pos/clover, /pos/exatouch, /pos/square navigate correctly. Page follows same patterns as Exatouch page tested in iteration_1.
